events.title: Parks on Tap at Historic Rittenhouse Town
events.venue: Historic Rittenhouse Town, 208 Lincoln Drive, Germantown, PA
events.description: Roving beer and cocktail garden. Parks on Tap provides a great excuse to bring your friends and kids to happy hour in a natural green space. A portion of all proceeds benefits each park. Open July 22-26, Wednesdays through Fridays 4-10pm, Saturdays and Sundays noon-10pm.
